rationale: Elec. Code §276.001 criminalizes retaliation against voters and has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A person commits an offense if, in retaliation against a voter who has voted for or against a candidate or measure or a voter who has refused to reveal how the voter voted, the person knowingly:
_note: Rule text concerns voter retaliation; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
